examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: 彼に話そうか話すまいか、本当に迷っている。
examples.translation: I'm really unsure whether to talk to him or not.
examples.translationEn: Im really unsure whether to talk to him or not
examples.romaji: Kare ni hanasou ka hanasu mai ka, hontou ni mayotte iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im really unsure whether to talk to him or not

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: 試験を受けようか受けまいか迷っています。
examples.translation: I'm wondering whether to take the exam or not.
examples.translationEn: Im wondering whether to take the exam or not
examples.romaji: Shiken o ukeyou ka ukemai ka mayotte imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im wondering whether to take the exam or not

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: あの人に謝ろうか謝るまいか考えています。
examples.translation: I'm considering whether to apologize to that person or not.
examples.translationEn: Im considering whether to apologize to that person or not
examples.romaji: Ano hito ni ayamarou ka ayamaru mai ka kangaete imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im considering whether to apologize to that person or not

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: 進学しようかしまいか悩んでいる。
examples.translation: I'm worried about whether to continue my studies or not.
examples.translationEn: Im worried about whether to continue my studies or not
examples.romaji: Shingaku shiyou ka shimai ka nayande iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Im worried about whether to continue my studies or not

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 彼が来ようが来るまいが、パーティーは始まります。
examples.translation: Whether he comes or not, the party will start.
examples.translationEn: Whether he comes or not, the party will start
examples.romaji: Kare ga koyou ga kurumai ga, paatii wa hajimarimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether he comes or not, the party will start

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 勉強しようがしまいが、テストの結果は変わらない。
examples.translation: Whether you study or not, the test results won't change.
examples.translationEn: Whether you study or not, the test results wont change
examples.romaji: Benkyou shiyou ga shimai ga, tesuto no kekka wa kawaranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether you study or not, the test results wont change

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 雨が降ろうが降るまいが、ピクニックに行きます。
examples.translation: Whether it rains or not, we're going on a picnic.
examples.translationEn: Whether it rains or not, were going on a picnic
examples.romaji: Ame ga furou ga furumai ga, pikunikku ni ikimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether it rains or not, were going on a picnic

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 暑かろうが寒かろうが、毎日ジョギングします。
examples.translation: Whether it's hot or cold, I jog every day.
examples.translationEn: Whether its hot or cold, I jog every day
examples.romaji: Atsukarou ga samukarou ga, mainichi jogingu shimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether its hot or cold, I jog every day

examples.sentence: 電車が混んでいて、動きようがない。
examples.translation: The train is so crowded that I can't move.
examples.translationEn: The train is so crowded that I cant move
examples.romaji: Densha ga konde ite, ugoki you ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The train is so crowded that I cant move

examples.sentence: 彼はとても早く走るので、追いつきようがない。
examples.translation: He runs so fast, there's no way I can catch up.
examples.translationEn: He runs so fast, theres no way I can catch up
examples.romaji: Kare wa totemo hayaku hashiru no de, oitsuki you ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He runs so fast, theres no way I can catch up

examples.sentence: 私には理解しようがない。
examples.translation: There's no way for me to understand it.
examples.translationEn: Theres no way for me to understand it
examples.romaji: Watashi ni wa rikai shiyou ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Theres no way for me to understand it

examples.sentence: どうやっても、これを直しようがない。
examples.translation: No matter what I try, there's no way to fix this.
examples.translationEn: No matter what I try, theres no way to fix this
examples.romaji: Dou yatte mo, kore o naoshi you ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: No matter what I try, theres no way to fix this

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようと Verbる まいと
examples.sentence: あなたが来ようと来るまいと、パーティーは予定通りに始まります。
examples.translation: Whether you come or not, the party will start as scheduled.
examples.translationEn: Whether you come or not, the party will start as scheduled
examples.romaji: Anata ga koyou to kuru mai to, paatii wa yotei doori ni hajimarimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether you come or not, the party will start as scheduled

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようと Verbる まいと
examples.sentence: 彼があそこに行こうと行くまいと、私たちは止めることができません。
examples.translation: Whether he tries to go there or not, we can't stop him.
examples.translationEn: Whether he tries to go there or not, we cant stop him
examples.romaji: Kare ga asoko ni ikou to iku mai to, watashitachi wa tomeru koto ga dekimasen.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether he tries to go there or not, we cant stop him

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようと Verbる まいと
examples.sentence: 彼女が謝ろうと謝るまいと、事実は変わらない。
examples.translation: Whether she apologizes or not, the fact won't change.
examples.translationEn: Whether she apologizes or not, the fact wont change
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga ayamarou to ayamaru mai to, jijitsu wa kawaranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether she apologizes or not, the fact wont change

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようと Verbる まいと
examples.sentence: 試験を受けようと受けるまいと、親として私はあなたを支えます。
examples.translation: Whether you take the exam or not, I will support you as your parent.
examples.translationEn: Whether you take the exam or not, I will support you as your parent
examples.romaji: Shiken o ukeyou to ukeru mai to, oya to shite watashi wa anata o sasaemasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Whether you take the exam or not, I will support you as your parent

examples.sentence: もう少し速く走ろうにも、足が痛くて無理だ。
examples.translation: I'd like to run a bit faster, but I can’t because my leg hurts.
examples.translationEn: Id like to run a bit faster, but I can’t because my leg hurts
examples.romaji: Mou sukoshi hayaku hashirou ni mo, ashi ga itakute muri da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Id like to run a bit faster, but I can’t because my leg hurts

examples.sentence: 彼に話そうにも、彼は私を無視している。
examples.translation: I want to talk to him, but he's ignoring me.
examples.translationEn: I want to talk to him, but hes ignoring me
examples.romaji: Kare ni hanasou ni mo, kare wa watashi o mushi shite iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I want to talk to him, but hes ignoring me

examples.sentence: もっと勉強しようにも、時間がない。
examples.translation: I want to study more, but I have no time.
examples.translationEn: I want to study more, but I have no time
examples.romaji: Motto benkyou shiyou ni mo, jikan ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I want to study more, but I have no time

examples.sentence: 彼女に謝ろうにも、彼女はもう怒っている。
examples.translation: I would like to apologize to her, but she's already angry.
examples.translationEn: I would like to apologize to her, but shes already angry
examples.romaji: Kanojo ni ayamarou ni mo, kanojo wa mou okotte iru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I would like to apologize to her, but shes already angry

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようにも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 彼を信じようにも信じられない証拠がある。
examples.translation: Even if I want to believe him, there's evidence that prevents me from doing so.
examples.translationEn: Even if I want to believe him, theres evidence that prevents me from doing so
examples.romaji: Kare o shinjiyou ni mo shinjirarenai shouko ga aru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if I want to believe him, theres evidence that prevents me from doing so

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようにも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 早く出発しようにも車が故障してしまった。
examples.translation: Even if I want to leave early, my car has broken down.
examples.translationEn: Even if I want to leave early, my car has broken down
examples.romaji: Hayaku shuppatsu shiyou ni mo kuruma ga koshou shite shimatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Even if I want to leave early, my car has broken down

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようにも Verb れない
examples.sentence: 彼に電話しようにも電話番号を知らない。
examples.translation: I want to call him, but I don’t know his phone number.
examples.translationEn: I want to call him, but I don’t know his phone number
examples.romaji: Kare ni denwa shiyou ni mo denwa bangou o shiranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I want to call him, but I don’t know his phone number

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようにも Verb れない
examples.sentence: もっと勉強しようにも時間がない。
examples.translation: I want to study more, but there is no time.
examples.translationEn: I want to study more, but there is no time
examples.romaji: Motto benkyou shiyou ni mo jikan ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I want to study more, but there is no time

examples.sentence: この問題は解きようもない。
examples.translation: It's impossible to solve this problem.
examples.translationEn: Its impossible to solve this problem
examples.romaji: Kono mondai wa toki you mo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its impossible to solve this problem

examples.sentence: これ以上我慢しようもない。
examples.translation: It's impossible to endure any further.
examples.translationEn: Its impossible to endure any further
examples.romaji: Kore ijou gaman shiyou mo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its impossible to endure any further

examples.sentence: 彼には通じようもない。
examples.translation: There's no way to get through to him.
examples.translationEn: Theres no way to get through to him
examples.romaji: Kare ni wa tsuujiyou mo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Theres no way to get through to him

examples.sentence: その薬は飲みようもない。
examples.translation: It's impossible to take (swallow) that medicine.
examples.translationEn: Its impossible to take (swallow) that medicine
examples.romaji: Sono kusuri wa nomiyou mo nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its impossible to take (swallow) that medicine

examples.sentence: 窓を開けるがままにしておいたら、風が部屋に入ってきました。
examples.translation: I left the window open as it was, and the wind came into the room.
examples.translationEn: I left the window open as it was, and the wind came into the room
examples.romaji: Mado o akeru ga mama ni shite oitara, kaze ga heya ni haitte kimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I left the window open as it was, and the wind came into the room

examples.sentence: 彼女は涙を流すがままに、ただ黙って座っていた。
examples.translation: She just sat quietly, letting her tears flow.
examples.translationEn: She just sat quietly, letting her tears flow
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa namida o nagasu ga mama ni, tada damatte suwatte ita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She just sat quietly, letting her tears flow

examples.sentence: 子供たちは笑うがままに、公園で走り回っていた。
examples.translation: The children ran around the park, laughing freely as they pleased.
examples.translationEn: The children ran around the park, laughing freely as they pleased
examples.romaji: Kodomo-tachi wa warau ga mama ni, kouen de hashirimawatte ita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The children ran around the park, laughing freely as they pleased

examples.sentence: 日が沈むがままに、私たちは海辺で話し続けました。
examples.translation: We kept talking by the sea, letting the sun set as it would.
examples.translationEn: We kept talking by the sea, letting the sun set as it would
examples.romaji: Hi ga shizumu ga mama ni, watashitachi wa umibe de hanashi tsudzukemashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: We kept talking by the sea, letting the sun set as it would

examples.sentence: 部屋に入るが早いか、彼はテレビをつけた。
examples.translation: No sooner had he entered the room than he turned on the TV.
examples.translationEn: No sooner had he entered the room than he turned on the TV
examples.romaji: Heya ni hairu ga hayai ka, kare wa terebi o tsuketa.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: No sooner had he entered the room than he turned on the TV

examples.sentence: 電車に乗るが早いか、私はすぐに眠ってしまった。
examples.translation: As soon as I got on the train, I immediately fell asleep.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I got on the train, I immediately fell asleep
examples.romaji: Densha ni noru ga hayai ka, watashi wa sugu ni nemutte shimatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As soon as I got on the train, I immediately fell asleep

examples.sentence: 彼女が見るが早いか、すぐに泣き始めた。
examples.translation: The moment she looked, she began to cry.
examples.translationEn: The moment she looked, she began to cry
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga miru ga hayai ka, sugu ni naki hajimeta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The moment she looked, she began to cry

examples.sentence: 給料をもらうが早いか、全て使い果たしてしまった。
examples.translation: No sooner had I received my salary than I spent it all.
examples.translationEn: No sooner had I received my salary than I spent it all
examples.romaji: Kyuuryou o morau ga hayai ka, subete tsukaihatashite shimatta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: No sooner had I received my salary than I spent it all
